title: The Return of the Prince
overview: Seigaku and other middle school students (with a total of 50 middle school students) are invited to the U-17 selection camp. Ryoma also comes back from America to participate. The high school students there dislike the middle school students.

title: The Gatekeeper of Hell
overview: Momoshiro gets paired up immediately in a shuffle match, being the first middle schooler to do so. His opponent is Jujiroh Oni.

title: Friendly Fire
overview: The middle schoolers pair up with friends, and find out that they will be playing singles tie-breaker matches against their partner.

title: The Captain's Choice
overview: Tezuka plays Kaidō and Atobe plays Hiyoshi.  Both captains have a plan from the start to teach their juniors a lesson before defeating them. Meanwhile, Ryoma and Kintarō are playing matches with Tokugawa and Oni.

title: Winners and Losers
overview: The matches continue, and the losers are forced to leave the camp. What happens now?

title: Cliffs of the Heart
overview: The winning middle school team start the next stage of their hard training right away.  The losers face the biggest challenge of their lifetime given to them by the mental coach, Saitō.

title: Start from Zero
overview: The losers reach the mountain peak and meet a drunken coach in primitive clothing.

title: Special Mission
overview: Ryoma, Tanishi, and Kenya receive a letter from Coach Nyudo asking them to sneak into the training camp to acquire training supplies.

title: Evolution and Change
overview: The middle schoolers, once again, have to face the challenging demands of Coach Mifune.

title: Good Bye, Tezuka Kunimitsu
overview: At the training camp in the mountains, the middle schoolers are given rackets filled with lead and are forced to hit balls with the rackets. Meanwhile, in the U-17 camp, Court 5 have team shuffle matches with Court 3.

title: Promise
overview: As Tezuka leaves, Fuji challenges him to a match.

title: Toward Your New Brilliant Selves
overview: The matches between the Black Jerseys and the camp winners concludes.
